installConfigs.instructions: Remote Supabase MCP server. No API key is required: on first connection Theia opens a browser to authorize access to your Supabase account via OAuth, then stores the resulting token automatically. Provides tools to manage Supabase projects, run SQL, and inspect database schemas.
